research.title: Fable 5 Vision Pipelines: Dense Documents, Degraded Screenshots, Real OCR Workloads
research.whyTrending: State-of-the-art vision (beat Pokemon FireRed vision-only; trained to crop/tool-use on blurry inputs). Vision-pipeline content for devs is scarce vs coding content.

seo.suggestedTitle: Fable 5 Vision Pipelines: Dense Docs, Bad Scans, Real OCR

strategy.angle: Vision content for devs is scarce vs coding content: working pipelines for dense PDFs (citations with page locations) and degraded inputs (the model crops/rotates its way to an answer), with the token-cost math (~3x per image) everyone discovers too late
strategy.title: Fable 5 Vision Pipelines: Dense Docs, Bad Scans, Real OCR
strategy.excerpt: Fable 5 reads rotated, blurry scans by cropping its way to an answer. Working pipelines for dense PDFs and degraded inputs, plus the image-token math that triples your bill.
outline: Hook: the scan that broke my pipeline
What changed: high-res, 1:1 coordinates, tool-assisted seeing
Model choice: Sonnet 5 volume vs Fable 5 ceiling
